---
title: "Torneo di birrapong"
subtitle: "Caldes (TN) - 13 aprile 2024"
author: "[Tommaso Rigon]{.orange}"
lang: it
date: 2024-04-14
execute:
  cache: false
format:
  html:
    html-math-method: katex
    echo: false
    callout-appearance: minimal
    theme: [cosmo, ../../template.css]
    toc: true
    embed-resources: false
    code-line-numbers: true
    smooth-scroll: true
    fig-dpi: 250
editor: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---



## Il risultato del torneo

<div class="flourish-embed flourish-chart" data-src="visualisation/17584594"><script src="https://public.flourish.studio/resources/embed.js"></script></div>
